name: testFilterByCardType
description: Filtering transactions by Card type displays only matching entries in the table.
descriptionHtml: Filtering transactions by Card type displays only matching entries in the table.

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Filtering transactions by Card type displays only matching entries in the table.

steps.name: Select 'MerchantCompanyForTestRunOnly Inc.' business unit using filter
Verify: transaction page table has data
Select Card type 'VISA' from dropdown menu
Verify: all entries in the 'Card type' column match the selected filter
